chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-913 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.1 to 6 a/w reply as Flag A 2. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Raja Amar, advocate alongwith the petitioner Ms. Rahat Ehsan, DPG Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG DSP Raza Mina, SHO Sikandar Saeed Umrani, PS Lohi Balochistan, SIP Noor Ahmed PS Manghopir West Karachi --------- Mr. Ghulam Ali Lasi, advocate files power on behalf of the respondents No.6, 7 & 8, which is taken on record. The petitioner submits that alleged detainee is detained in Lohi Balochistan. Since the petitioner himself knows whereabouts of the alleged detainee that she is confined in criminal jurisdiction of the Balochistan High Court, therefore, this petition is not maintainable. He may file petition before the Balochistan High Court seeking recovery of alleged detainee, if he so desired. The petition is dismissed having non-maintainable. JUDGE Nadir*
